semanticCore: Speech, logic, girdle, zone, or articulation
quranicRelevance: Verbal speech/articulation (Nutq - 'hatha kitabuna yantiqu 'alaykum'), and speech of birds ('mantiq al-tayr').

keyDerivations.meaning: To speak, articulate, utter, express, or declare

figurativeOrRareUsages: عُلِّمْنَا مَنْطِقَ الطَّيْرِ (24:16): We have been taught the speech/language of birds (Solomon's understanding of creature calls).
هَذَا كِتَابُنَا يَنْطِقُ عَلَيْكُمْ بِالحَقِّ: This is Our record speaking/declaring against you in truth.
discardedNoise: The science of formal logic (Mantiq) in philosophy.
The girdle or sash (نِطاق) worn around the waist.
summaryEn: The root denotes speech and expression, representing human articulation, Solomon's comprehension of bird calls, and the speaking of the record of deeds.
summaryAr: يدل هذا الجذر على النطق والإعراب، واصفاً البيان والنطق البشري، وفهم لغة الطيور السليمانية (منطق)، ونطق كتاب الأعمال.
rawText: الحِكْمَةُ المَنْطُوقُ بِهَا : see حِكْمَةٌ. اِسْتَنْطَقَهُ 10 He desired him to speak; (TA;) [interrogated him:] he spoke to him until, or so that, he spoke. (Msb.) تَنَاطَقَا 6 They two talked, or discoursed, each with the other; like تَقاَوَلَا. (TA.) مَنْطِقٌ Speech: (S:) Diction; or expression of ideas, or meanings, by voice and words. (K, TA.) مِنْطَقَةٌ I. q. حِيَاصَةٌ; (Msb;) A kind of girdle, zone, or waist-belt, which is fastened round the waist with a buckle or clasp; worn by men and by women; and when worn by wealthy women generally adorned with jewels, &c., and having also two plates of silver or gold, also generally jewelled, which clasp together. See إِبْزِيمٌ. مِنْطِيقٌ Eloquent: (S, K:) or able in speech; an able speaker. (TA in art. فوه.) نَاطَقَهٌ 3 , inf. n. مُنَاطَقَةٌ, He talked, or discoursed, with him; syn. كَالَمَهُ, (TA,) followed by بِ before the subject of talk, &c. (TA in art. فرغ.) نَاطِقٌ === اطيار ناطقة Singing birds. === نَاطِقٌ an epithet applied to A deenár. === جَذْرٌ نَاطِقٌ A rational root, in arithmetic; opposed to جَذْرٌ أَصَمُّ. (Mgh, art. جذر.) === حَيَوَانٌ نَاطِقٌ A rational animal. نَاطِقِيَّةٌ Rationality. نَطَقَ 1 trans. by means of ب: see Ham, p. 75. === نَطَقَ بِهِ means he pronounced it, or articulated it. === نَطَقَ, said of a bird or any animal: see Bd, xxvii. 16. نِطَاقٌ The bar (مترس) of a door. (TA, art. لز.) === نِطاَقُ الجَوْزَآءِ The Belt of Orion: see الجَوْزَآءُ. نِطَاقَةٌ A ticket of price, or weight: see بِطَاقَةٌ.
